2604.28118.title: DEFault++: Automated Fault Detection, Categorization, and Diagnosis for Transformer Architectures
2604.28118.paper_summary: Transformer models are widely deployed in critical AI applications, yet faults in their attention mechanisms, projections, and other internal components often degrade behavior silently without raising runtime errors. Existing fault diagnosis techniques often target generic deep neural networks and cannot identify which transformer component is responsible for an observed symptom. In this article, we present DEFault++, a hierarchical learning-based diagnostic technique that operates at three level of abstraction: it detects whether a fault is present, classifies it into one of 12 transformer-specific fault categories (covering both attention-internal mechanisms and surrounding architectural components), and identifies the underlying root cause from up to 45 mechanisms. To facilitate both training and evaluation, we construct DEFault-bench, a benchmark of 3,739 labeled instances obtained through systematic mutation testing. These instances are created across seven transformer models and nine downstream tasks using DEForm, a transformer-specific mutation technique we developed for this purpose. DEFault++ measures runtime behavior at the level of individual transformer components. It organizes these measurements through a Fault Propagation Graph (FPG) derived from the transformer architecture. It then produces an interpretable diagnosis using prototype matching combined with supervised contrastive learning. On DEFault-bench, DEFault++ exceeds an AUROC of 0.96 for detection and a Macro-F1 of 0.85 for both categorization and root-cause diagnosis on encoder and decoder architectures. In a developer study with 21 practitioners, the accuracy of choosing correct repair actions increased from 57.1% without support to 83.3% when using DEFault++.
2604.28118.paper_summary_zh: Transformer模型在關鍵的人工智慧應用中被廣泛部署，但其注意力機制、投影和其他內部組件中的故障往往會在不引發運行時錯誤的情況下靜默地降低行為表現。現有的故障診斷技術通常針對通用深度神經網絡，無法識別出導致觀察到的症狀的具體Transformer組件。在本文中，我們提出了DEFault++，這是一種基於分層學習的診斷技術，運作於三個抽象層級：它檢測故障是否存在，將其分類為12個特定於Transformer的故障類別（涵蓋內部注意力機制和周邊架構組件），並從多達45種機制中識別出根本原因。為了促進訓練和評估，我們構建了DEFault-bench，這是一個通過系統性變異測試獲得的3,739個標記實例的基準。這些實例是通過我們為此目的開發的特定於Transformer的變異技術DEForm，在七個Transformer模型和九個下游任務中創建的。DEFault++在個別Transformer組件的層面上測量運行時行為。它通過從Transformer架構衍生的故障傳播圖（FPG）組織這些測量。然後，它使用原型匹配結合監督對比學習生成可解釋的診斷。在DEFault-bench上，DEFault++在檢測方面超過了0.96的AUROC，在編碼器和解碼器架構上，分類和根本原因診斷的Macro-F1達到了0.85。在一項針對21名從業者的開發者研究中，選擇正確修復行動的準確率從沒有支持的57.1%提高到使用DEFault++時的83.3%。
2604.28118.author: Sigma Jahan et.al.
2604.28118.authors: Sigma Jahan, Saurabh Singh Rajput, Tushar Sharma, Mohammad Masudur Rahman
